name: 法玛斯 | 元素轮廓
descriptionEn: A cheap option for cash-strapped players, the FAMAS effectively fills the niche between more expensive rifles and the less-effective SMGs. It has been custom painted in a modern red and grey design that complements the weapon's form. We're always stronger together
descriptionZh: 给手头紧的玩家的一个廉价选择，法玛斯有效地填补了昂贵的步枪和杀伤力较低的微型冲锋枪之间的空缺。 这把武器使用补足了武器形式的现代红灰色设计图案进行了自定义涂装。 兄弟同心，其利断金
